#  What options do I have for numbering RFIs in Procore? 
##  Answer 
You have several options for numbering RFIs in Procore's RFIs tool. To learn about your options, see one of the FAQs below:
  * [How does Procore assign numbers to RFIs?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-does-procore-assign-numbers-to-rfis)
  * [How do I configure a prefix and starting number for a project's RFIs?](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/configure-a-prefix-and-starting-number-for-rfis)
  * [Can I create an RFI with a duplicate number?](https://support.procore.com/faq/can-i-create-an-rfi-with-a-duplicate-number)


## See Also
  * [Why do some of our project's RFI numbers have two prefixes?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-why-do-some-of-our-projects-rfi-numbers-have-two-prefixes)
  * [How does Procore assign numbers to RFIs?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-does-procore-assign-numbers-to-rfis)
  * [What's the difference between adding an assignee to a RFI and forwarding an RFI for review?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-whats-the-difference-between-adding-an-assignee-to-an-rfi-and-forwarding-an-rfi-for-review)
title: What options do I have for numbering RFIs in Procore?
